data.reason: The text explicitly states that Section 6.6 and the definition of Permitted Addbacks were amended by Amendment No. 1, and that determinations for fiscal quarters ending on or after April 30, 2013 give effect to that amendment. This indicates a governing instrument is referenced but not yet applied in the current calculation.
